name: Agilent
notes: Bravo, AssayMAP. Pharma incumbent on the analytical/automation crossover.

notes: Oxford-based fully-automated drug discovery CRO. Ulysses platform; 40+ partner programs. Founded 2016.

name: Artificial
notes: Whole-lab orchestration unifying instruments, informatics, and AI agents for pharma/biotech labs.

name: Automata
notes: UK-based; Linq linear-track system.

name: Beckman Coulter Life Sciences
notes: Biomek line under Danaher. Pharma default since the 90s.

name: Benchling
notes: Dominant biotech ELN/LIMS. Adding AI features.

name: Biosero
notes: Long-running orchestrator under BICO group.

name: Briefly Bio
notes: Protocol authoring with structured provenance.

name: Cellares
theses: accountability:m5/i4; scale:m5/i4; hardware-modularity:m4/i3; next-generation-hardware:m4/i4; dexterity:m3/i3; multi-modal-sensing:m2/i3
notes: Cell Shuttle — fully automated, closed-system CAR-T and cell-therapy manufacturing platform. Founded 2019; >$255M raised. (The "ARES"-looking logo on the Cheshire map was actually Cellares.)

name: Celltrio
notes: Automated cell-culture/incubation systems.

name: Chai Discovery
notes: Chai-1 structure prediction model.

name: Charles River
notes: Largest preclinical CRO. The non-AI baseline for "science as a service."

name: Cheshire Labs
notes: Builds the Orca scheduler and Swarm AI MCP layer for unified lab control. Publishes the lab-automation landscape map this catalog was extracted from.

name: Cornucopia Bio
notes: Remote, AI-driven CRO running qPCR and ELISA assays from a browser prompt. Founded 2025 in San Francisco.

name: Cromatic
notes: Marketplace + project management platform matching biotechs with vetted CROs. $5.3M seed.

name: Cytena
notes: Single-cell dispensing for cell-line dev. Part of BICO group.

name: Cytiva
notes: Major bioprocess incumbent under Danaher.

name: Dash Bio
notes: Automated bioanalysis CRO running GLP-compliant ELISA, MSD, LCMS, and PCR via purpose-built automation. $17.5M total funding.

name: Dispendix
notes: I.DOT non-contact picoliter dispenser. BICO group.

name: Dynamic Devices
posture: agile liquid handlers with sensor feedback
notes: Lynx, Felix. Distinguished by force-feedback and capacitive sensors integrated into the workdeck.

name: Edison Scientific
notes: FutureHouse spinout building Kosmos — an AI scientist agent for literature, hypothesis generation, and data analysis. $70M raised.

name: Emerald Cloud Lab
notes: OG cloud lab. Long sales cycle, real revenue.

name: Formulatrix
notes: Mantis, Rover, Tempest.

name: Genie Life Sciences
notes: Formally dissolved 2024-12-17. Built LabOS orchestration plus LabMate liquid handler integrating Opentrons and third-party instruments. Influence scores zeroed since the company no longer ships product.

name: Ginkgo Bioworks
categories: cloud-labs:m4/i3; cell-culture-automation:m3/i3; orchestration-scheduling:m2/i2; integration-hardware:m2/i2; mobility-transport:m2/i2; data-generation:m3/i3
notes: Largest US biofoundry. SPAC-era public co. Talks broadly about cloud-lab and orchestration capability but most install base is internal.

name: Hamilton
notes: STAR, Vantage. Proprietary liquid-class library is the moat. Deep capacitive/gravimetric sensing.

name: HighRes Biosolutions
notes: Custom workcell integrations. Cellario scheduler. Acquired by Axel Johnson Group (Dec 2022); still operating under that ownership.

name: Insilico Medicine
notes: Generative chemistry + biology platform (Pharma.AI). IPO'd on HKEX (3696.HK) Dec 2025, raising HKD 2.27B.

name: Integra Biosciences
notes: Pipettes, ASSIST PLUS — entry-level automation.

name: Isomorphic Labs
notes: Alphabet spin-out. AlphaFold lineage.

name: Kiin Bio
notes: Bayesian DOE / experiment planning.

name: Labguru
notes: Long-running ELN/LIMS by Cenevo.

name: Lila Sciences

notes: Physical AI scientist platform — general-purpose robots with VLA driven by natural language to run closed-loop life-science experiments. $52M Series A.

name: Miltenyi Biotec
notes: CliniMACS, MACSQuant. Dominant in cell-therapy GMP.

name: Molecular Devices
notes: ImageXpress (Danaher). High-content imaging.

name: Monomer Bio
categories: cell-culture-automation:m5/i1; orchestration-scheduling:m4/i1; flexible-protocol-generation:m4/i1; integration-software-drivers:m3/i1; lims:m2/i1; eln:m2/i1
notes: Pacifica-based; integrated platform fusing instrument orchestration with workflow management for cell engineering and cell culture (stem, primary, immortalized lines). $5.6M seed (Talis Capital, 2024). Founders ex-Google / Benchling / Strateos / Kensho.

name: Multiply Labs
notes: Cell & gene therapy GMP automation. Robotic-arm-based individualized cell-therapy workcells. Acquired Strateos (Dec 2023). AstraZeneca + Thermo Fisher partnerships 2025–26.

name: Opentrons
notes: Open-source-friendly liquid handlers.

name: Owkin
notes: Federated learning for biopharma.

name: Phylo
notes: Biomni Lab — agentic AI workspace where biologists plan, author, and execute experiments via natural language. $13.5M seed (a16z, Menlo).

name: Plasmidsaurus
notes: Nanopore-based plasmid full-sequence service. Beloved among bench scientists.

name: Potato
notes: Tater AI co-scientist — hypothesis generation, protocol design, lit review, manuscript drafting. $4.5M seed (Draper).

name: PyLabRobot
notes: MIT-led open-source lab-control library.

name: Recursion
notes: Phenomic screening at scale. Merged with Exscientia.

name: Relay Therapeutics
notes: Protein dynamics / motion-based discovery.

name: RetiSoft
notes: Genera scheduler.

name: Revvity
notes: Janus, Sciclone. Public as RVTY since 2023 (the "PerkinElmer" name was sold separately to New Mountain Capital in 2022 — current entity is just Revvity).

name: Robot On Rails
notes: Boston-based autonomous lab robot using natural-language interaction over multiple workstations. Robotic arms over liquid handlers signals dexterity-first thesis.

name: Sartorius
notes: Bioprocess giant; integrating digital tools.

name: Scispot
notes: Lighter, modern LIMS with orchestration.

name: SiLA
notes: Specification consortium, not a company.

name: Spaero Bio
notes: ML + computer-vision software layer that flexibly generates and adapts protocols on liquid handlers like Hamilton. Founded 2020.

name: SPT Labtech
notes: Mosquito (genomics low-volume), Firefly.

name: Strateos
notes: Formerly Transcriptic. Acquired by Multiply Labs (Dec 2023); brand still operates with ~28 employees as of Feb 2026.

name: Synthace
notes: Antha protocol language. Heavy DOE focus.

name: Tecan
notes: Fluent, Freedom EVO.

name: Tetsuwan Scientific
notes: Glass-cube robotic AI scientists running ResearchOS. Robotic-arm-only (no liquid handler) signals dexterity-first thesis. $2.7M pre-seed.

name: Thermo Fisher Scientific
notes: Largest life-sciences supplier. Many automation brands.

name: Trilobio
notes: Modular hardware + software stack.

name: UniteLabs
notes: Munich-based Python connectivity platform with SiLA 2-compliant drivers and CDK linking 100+ instruments across vendors.

name: Zeon Systems
notes: YC S25 startup translating plain-English experiment descriptions into robotic-arm execution with computer-vision labware detection. Piloting at Stanford and UCSF.
